title: A proposed West African string-tradition parallel
explanation: This record proposes string-bending and buzzing-tone parallels between West African string traditions and field hollers. Smithsonian Folkways supports a broader connection between West African musical traditions and field hollers, but does not establish this specific mechanism or a direct unbroken lineage.
curatorNote: Retained to demonstrate explicit uncertainty. The specific timbral comparison requires further specialist review.
